lessons: Deadeye (bow) killed us in 3 of last 4 rounds — retreat to cover or narrow corridors immediately on sight; open areas are lethal.
Sword users were killed 18 times in last 5 rounds — aggressively prioritize them; they lack ranged options and die quickly to staff sweeps if caught in range.
Spear users (Lancer, Reaper) killed us in rounds 405, 411, and 408 — avoid open engagements; spear has 93+ sightings in 3 of last 5 rounds and outranges staff.
Shredder (daggers) killed us in round 407 — maintain distance; their speed and close-range burst outmaneuver staff’s slow swing and turn rate.
Staff has 23 wins in 136 rounds — highest win rate of any weapon; continue using it but avoid prolonged fights against shields or ranged enemies.
Hazard_storm rounds (408, 411) saw 109+ bow and 117+ spear sightings — prioritize eliminating ranged enemies before zone collapse.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff remains the highest-win-rate weapon despite recent losses, and no data suggests a superior alternative.
